ns0:entry.ns0:title: DearVa/Everywhere
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DearVa/Everywhere
Language: c%23
Context-aware AI assistant for your desktop. Ready to respond intelligently, seamlessly integrating multiple LLMs and MCP tools.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Devolutions/UniGetUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Devolutions/UniGetUI
Language: c%23
UniGetUI: The Graphical Interface for your package managers. Could be terribly described as a package manager manager to manage your package managers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Jackett/Jackett
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Jackett/Jackett
Language: c%23
API Support for your favorite torrent trackers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Klocman/Bulk-Crap-Uninstaller
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Klocman/Bulk-Crap-Uninstaller
Language: c%23
Remove large amounts of unwanted applications quickly.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenRA/OpenRA
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenRA/OpenRA
Language: c%23
Open Source real-time strategy game engine for early Westwood games such as Command & Conquer: Red Alert written in C# using SDL and OpenGL. Runs on Windows, Linux, *BSD and Mac OS X.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QL-Win/QuickLook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QL-Win/QuickLook
Language: c%23
Bring macOS “Quick Look” feature to Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aelassas/servy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aelassas/servy
Language: c%23
Run Any App as a Native Windows Service - Modern Alternative to NSSM, WinSW & FireDaemon Pro

ns0:entry.ns0:title: builtbybel/Winslopr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/builtbybel/Winslopr
Language: c%23
Windows Slop Remover

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/dotnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/dotnet
Language: c%23
Home of .NET's Virtual Monolithic Repository which includes all the code needed to build the .NET SDK.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/eShop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/eShop
Language: c%23
A reference .NET application implementing an eCommerce site

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fullstackhero/dotnet-starter-kit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fullstackhero/dotnet-starter-kit
Language: c%23
Production Grade Cloud-Ready .NET 10 Starter Kit (Web API + Blazor Client) with Multitenancy Support, and Clean/Modular Architecture that saves roughly 200+ Development Hours! All Batteries Included.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: icsharpcode/ILSpy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/icsharpcode/ILSpy
Language: c%23
.NET Decompiler with support for PDB generation, ReadyToRun, Metadata (&more) - cross-platform!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jasontaylordev/CleanArchitecture
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jasontaylordev/CleanArchitecture

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kgrzybek/modular-monolith-with-ddd
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lucasg/Dependencies
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lucasg/Dependencies
Language: c%23
A rewrite of the old legacy software "depends.exe" in C# for Windows devs to troubleshoot dll load dependencies issues.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: memstechtips/Winhance
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/memstechtips/Winhance
Language: c%23
Application designed to optimize, customize and enhance your Windows experience.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/ParticleEffectForUGUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/ParticleEffectForUGUI
Language: c%23
Render particle effect in UnityUI(uGUI). Maskable, sortable, and no extra Camera/RenderTexture/Canvas.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nopSolutions/nopCommerce
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nopSolutions/nopCommerce
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core eCommerce software. nopCommerce is a free and open-source shopping cart.
